archive_type¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True
unique True

collection¶

default: None

attribute value
alias dataset
lowercase False
optional True
unique True

colormap_statistic¶

default: None

the statistic to use to color the colormap associated to the bars in the plot

attribute value
optional True
unique True

database¶

default: ob_ops

attribute value
unique True

date¶

default: None

A list of dates. The convenience function in <semperpy.core.date.Dates> can generate lists of dates from an interval and an increment

attribute value
optional True
type int

datefile¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True
unique True

domain_name¶

default: None

Pre-defined geographical areas or domains: n.europe, sw.europe, n.amer, tropics, global, india, pacific, s.hem, e.trop.pac, n.hem.full, arabia, n.subtropics, austnz, asia, indian, n.pole, s.hem.full, s.subtropics, nw.afr, europe, med, australia, s.hem.mid, s.afr, s.amer.n, newdomain, n.atl, s.amer.s, n.hem, atlantic, n.pac, c.afr, n.hem.mid, e.asia, trop.pac, indonesia, austtrop, trop.atl, se.europe, trop.ind, ind.oc, s.pole, baltic

attribute value
alias domain
optional True
validate ValidateDomains
  semperpy

expver¶

default: None

attribute value
alias experiment_id
  expid
lowercase False
optional True
unique True

file_tmpl¶

default: None

attribute value
lowercase False
optional True
unique True

filename¶

default: None

File containing a list of kx, kt identifiers to process

attribute value
optional True

kt¶

default: None

Identifier of the type of observations

attribute value
alias obstype
optional True
type int

kx¶

default: None

Identifier of the observation source system

attribute value
alias obssource
optional True
type int

level¶

default: None

The pressure level for upper air observations, 0 for surface, or the channel number for satellite data, hence the alias channel. If ‘all’ is specified, the official list of pressure levels or channels for the kx-kt observations being processed are used.

attribute value
alias channel
ignore_type_errors True
optional True
type float

staging_rate¶

default: None

attribute value
lowercase False
optional True
unique True

statistic¶

default: None

the list of statistics to compute or retrieve for the specified set of observations current statistics: product: sum, product: mean, score: rms, score: cor, obsstat: count, obsstat: rms, obsstat: beneficial, obsstat: sum, obsstat: impact_per_anl, obsstat: count_per_anl, obsstat: rate, obsstat: impact_per_ob, obsstat: sumsquare, obsstat: esigb, obsstat: esigo, obsstat: fractional_impact, obsstat: normcost, obsstat: mean

attribute value
alias stat
  stats
  statistics
optional True

default: dbreader

attribute value
unique True
